title: Clean up the suggestions in my book — sort the good from the junk
fixture: a book with a real pile of auto-suggestions (26 drafts incl. genuine duplicates 'Dracula'/'Count Dracula' and junk like 'Gothic Atmosphere') — SKILL_BOOK_ID
fixture_note: The spec's §4 imagined a 6-item pile with 2 empties + 1 duplicate. This runs on the real 26-item Dracula pile, which naturally contains duplicates and junk. Turn wording is adapted to items that actually exist; the black-box job (keep / junk / merge / honest count / pile drains) is unchanged.

turns.user: Clean up the suggested items in my book.
Keep the real characters and places, throw out the junk ones, and combine the duplicates — 'Dracula' and 'Count Dracula' are the same person.
'Gothic Atmosphere' isn't a thing in my world, it's just a mood — get rid of it.
